title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Go CLI and server that lets you pull, create, and run LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, create, list, copy, delete models via Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (React/Starlette) for any Ollama model; chat history, multi-user, RAG, voice.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping Ollama’s REST API with typed models and streaming.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI (Terminal User Interface) for browsing, chatting with, and managing Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as inline Copilot suggestions and chat panel.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template for RAG pipelines using Ollama embeddings + any local vector DB.

title: ollama-codellama-vscode
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension that uses CodeLlama via Ollama for code completion and explanation.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for the Ollama REST API with async HTTP and native structs.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET library and CLI for chatting and generating with Ollama models from C#/F#.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-chatbot-react
summary: Starter React chatbot component that streams responses from any Ollama model.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s REST endpoints.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, and answer questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt bot that answers channel mentions with streaming responses from Ollama.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot (Go) for private or group chats powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by the community; use Ollama models as generators or chatters in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-model-importer
summary: Official guide and helper scripts to convert Hugging Face models into Ollama Modelfile format.
